messages.content: Tell me about Free Peer Tutoring — CSF (California Scholastic Federation).

DBHS offers free peer tutoring provided by CSF students in any subject. After-school sessions meet Monday through Thursday in Room 655, and before-school sessions meet Tuesday and Thursday in Room 656. No cost to students.
Can you explain International Baccalaureate (IB) Diploma Program — Overview?

DBHS offers the IB Diploma Program (DP), a challenging two-year curriculum for students aged 16–19 that leads to a globally recognized qualification. The program encourages inquiry, intercultural understanding, and lifelong learning. IB contact is Margaret Ku.
What is the DBHS mascot?
The DBHS mascot is the Brahma Bull.
What time does DBHS start on a regular day?

On regular school days (Mon, Tue, Thu, Fri), DBHS runs 7 periods. School starts at 8:30 AM for Period 1 and ends at 3:30 PM for Period 6. Brunch is at 10:30 AM and Lunch at 12:48 PM

What is the Summer School Bell Schedule?

Summer school runs two periods per day. Period 1 is 7:30–10:00 AM. Period 2 (WVUSD/D2L) runs 10:30 AM–1:00 PM; Mt. SAC classes run until 1:30 PM
Period times:

Who do I call if my child is absent from DBHS?
The DBHS attendance line is (909) 594-1860. Call this number to report an absence.
What should I know about Enrollment Documents Required — Resident Students at DBHS?
Students living with parents must submit eight documents to complete DBHS enrollment, including proof of residency, immunization records, and student identification.
Can you tell me the name of the DBHS principal?
The principal of Diamond Bar High School is David Hong.
How do I schedule an appointment at the DBHS Career Center?

Ms. Ayala works in the College and Career Center, located inside the Express Library (Room 265). She processes work permit applications (1–2 business days). Students can schedule appointments via Calendly Responsibilities include: Work permit processing, Career counseling, College resources.
Who do I contact about my student records at DBHS?

Mrs. Myoung Han is the DBHS Registrar. She handles enrollment, transcripts, and student records. Contact her if a Parchment transcript request is not processed within 2 business days Responsibilities include: Enrollment processing, Transcript requests, Student records.
Can you tell me about Theresa A. Guest?
Theresa A. Guest, MSN, RN, NCSN, is the DBHS School Nurse. She can be reached at 951-453-3316.
What are Diamond Bar High School's colors?
DBHS school colors are Purple and Gold.
Who is Mr. Desmond?
Mr. Desmond and Mrs. Tumbeiro are the Grade Level Coordinators for the Class of 2026 (current seniors). They assist with scheduling, college applications, and personal guidance.
Tell me about Student Fees Policy — Free Public Education.

The California Constitution mandates that public education be provided free of charge. DBHS cannot require students to pay for educational activities, materials, supplies, or uniforms, whether curricular or extracurricular. A waiver process for a mandatory fee does not make the fee constitutional.
What year was DBHS founded?
Diamond Bar High School opened in 1982.

Ms. Brummett serves as the Grade Level Coordinator for the Pathways Communications Academy at DBHS.
Who handles ib program contact at DBHS?

When is the DBHS office open?
DBHS school office hours are 7:30 AM – 4:00 PM, Monday–Friday.
Can you summarize DBHS Mathematics Department?

DBHS Mathematics ('Brahma Mathematics') has won regional and national math competitions including California Mathematics League Regional Championships (2011, 2013, 2014, 2016, 2022) and AP Calculus World Championships (2005, 2007). Students requesting recommendation letters from math teachers must submit requests at least 3 weeks before the deadline and check teacher-specific requirements 5 weeks in advance.
What is Diamond Bar High School's CEEB code?
The Diamond Bar High School CEEB code (also called the College Board code) is 050748. Students need this code when registering for the SAT, ACT, AP exams, or completing college applications.
What does Mrs. Han do at Diamond Bar High School?

Mrs. Myoung Han is the DBHS Registrar. She handles enrollment, transcripts, and student records. Contact her if a Parchment transcript request is not processed within 2 business days Responsibilities include: Enrollment processing, Transcript requests, Student records.
Can you summarize United Student Body (USB) — Overview?

USB (United Student Body) is the student government at DBHS, chosen over 'ASB' at the 1982 student body convention. USB has 6 executive board members and 34 commissioners. Members serve January–December and are enrolled in 4th period Leadership class. USB manages lunchtime activities, rallies, dances, the Student Store, and club approvals.
Tell me about Student Clubs and Organizations.

DBHS has a large number of active student clubs for the 2025–26 school year. The official roster is maintained by USB. Jeremiah Wai updates the reference list. The full club list (with names, advisors, and meeting details) is in an embedded Google Sheet.
Who advises Class of 2029 students at DBHS?
Mr. Galeener and Mrs. Duenas are the Grade Level Coordinators for the Class of 2029 (current freshmen).
Can you summarize Care Solace / Mental Health Crisis Resources?

DBHS provides Care Solace resources and the LA County ACCESS hotline for mental health emergencies. The LA County hotline operates 24/7 and provides crisis evaluation teams, information, referrals, and interpreter services.
Tell me about English Learner Program / ELAC.

The DBHS English Learner Program provides support for English learner students and is connected to the English Learner Advisory Committee (ELAC). The DELAC Representative is Mr. Nan Jiang. An ELD Resource Hub is available online.
Tell me about DBHS Vision, Mission, and Student Learning Outcomes (SLOs).

DBHS's vision is to be a premier school committed to the intellectual, physical, and social development of every student. The mission centers on the five A's — Academics, Access, Activities, Arts, and Athletics — so each student receives a personalized educational program from a rigorous curriculum.
What is Parent Groups — The Magnificent Seven?
DBHS has seven parent support organizations collectively known as the 'Magnificent Seven.' They provide essential financial and volunteer support to the school.
What is Advanced Placement (AP) Program?

DBHS offers a robust AP program coordinated by Jennifer Burns. Students register in AP Classroom (via teacher join codes) and pay for exams through the DBHS Webstore. Important deadlines govern payment, cancellation, and fee-reduction forms.
How old is DBHS?
Diamond Bar High School opened in 1982.
Tell me about DBHS Graduation Requirements.

All DBHS students must complete specific graduation requirements. The full authoritative list is in the Course Description Book (PDF). Key requirements include Physical Education, Social Science, Health, Applied Arts, and a visual/performing arts course for UC/CSU entrance.
